response.global_analysis: The video segment consists of a variety skit followed by a musical performance. The skit features interaction between four characters (Anya, Ollie, Kiara, Calli) and a guest (Luna), involving physical gags such as Anya becoming giant and then tiny after drinking suspicious tea. The musical section is a performance of 'Supernova'. Transcription and timing are strictly aligned with the spoken Japanese and the song's audio waveform. Translation captures the informal, humorous tone of the dialogue and the poetic nature of the lyrics. Lyrics and credits were verified against on-screen text and the reference JSON.

subtitles.original: 高いとこと低いとこで ババババンッて
subtitles.english: With high parts and low parts... boom boom boom.

subtitles.original: 確かに 確かに
subtitles.english: True, true.

subtitles.original: 低いとこばっかだったよ私
subtitles.english: I was mostly doing the low parts.

subtitles.original: あるよね でもかっこよかったですよ
subtitles.english: Right? But it was so cool!

subtitles.original: まろろーん…とかね あんな低いの出したことないよ
subtitles.english: Like 'maroro-n'... I've never made a voice that low!

subtitles.original: イケボIRyS珍しいからさ たまにはいいんじゃないかな
subtitles.english: Ikebo IRyS is rare, so isn't it good once in a while?

subtitles.original: まあ確かにね こういうイケボIRyS レアなんでね
subtitles.english: Well, true. This kind of Ikebo IRyS is rare.

subtitles.original: 8歳だもんね
subtitles.english: Since she's 8 years old.

subtitles.original: 8歳なのにね！
subtitles.english: Even though I'm 8!

subtitles.original: 8歳のイケボ？ もう、もう！ それはそれ
subtitles.english: An 8-year-old's Ikebo? Geez! That's that.

subtitles.original: みんな受け取ってね IRySのかっこよさを
subtitles.english: Everyone, accept it. IRyS's coolness.

subtitles.original: てへ、8歳 ごめん
subtitles.english: Hehe, 8 years old. Sorry.

subtitles.original: 絶対この後アーカイブ見返して
subtitles.english: Definitely check the archive later.

subtitles.original: やだ 見たくない！
subtitles.english: No, I don't want to see it!

subtitles.original: 見返して！ 見てほしい！
subtitles.english: Watch it! I want you to see!

subtitles.original: あにゃのライブはちゃんと見てね
subtitles.english: Watch Anya's live, but...

subtitles.original: この部分だけ飛ばして
subtitles.english: ...skip just this part.

subtitles.original: 一番大事なとこでしょ！
subtitles.english: That's the most important part!

subtitles.original: めっちゃ喉渇いたな
subtitles.english: My throat is so dry.

subtitles.original: あら 喉渇いた？
subtitles.english: Oh, is your throat dry?

subtitles.original: 急に喉渇いたね このテンションで
subtitles.english: Suddenly dry? With this tension.

subtitles.original: 喉渇いたな… あらあら お飲み物ないかな？
subtitles.english: My throat is dry... oh my... isn't there something to drink?

subtitles.original: あ！ なんか来た！ なんか出てきたよ
subtitles.english: Ah! Something's coming! Something's appeared!

subtitles.original: あにゃちゃーん！ たくさん歌って喉渇いたでしょ！
subtitles.english: Anya-chan! You sang a lot, so you must be dry!

subtitles.original: そうだよ！
subtitles.english: That's right!

subtitles.original: これ飲んでほしいのら
subtitles.english: I want you to drink this.

subtitles.original: 何その声？ 怪しい 怪しい…
subtitles.english: What's with that voice? Suspicious, suspicious...

subtitles.original: なんかこぼしてる！
subtitles.english: She's spilling something!

subtitles.original: はい これは…
subtitles.english: Here, this is...

subtitles.original: 怪しいな… 熱っ！ これ何？ 湯気立ってる 熱っ！
subtitles.english: Suspicious... hot! What is this? Steam is rising, so hot!

subtitles.original: 熱そう！ うんとしごく熱いもの 飲んで飲んで！
subtitles.english: Looks hot! Something very hot, drink it, drink it!

subtitles.original: まあ 一旦飲むか
subtitles.english: Well, I'll drink it for now.

subtitles.original: 本当に飲んだ！ すごい 一気飲み？
subtitles.english: She really drank it! Wow, in one go?

subtitles.original: ふぅ… めっちゃ めっちゃ美味しかったよでも
subtitles.english: Phew... but it was really, really delicious.

subtitles.original: ホント？ 怪しかったけど めっちゃ美味しかった？
subtitles.english: Really? It was suspicious, but really delicious?

subtitles.original: よかった
subtitles.english: Good.

subtitles.original: うわぁぁ！ 何これ？！
subtitles.english: Whoa! What's this?!

subtitles.original: ちょっと待って あにゃ？！ どういうこと？！
subtitles.english: Wait, Anya?! What do you mean?!

subtitles.original: でっけぇぇ！
subtitles.english: You're huge!

subtitles.original: あんまり動き回らないでよ！ 足元注意！
subtitles.english: Don't move around too much! Watch your step!

subtitles.original: すごーい！ でかくなったんだけど！
subtitles.english: Amazing! She got so big!

subtitles.original: すごい揺れるんだけど！ これ潰れるな
subtitles.english: It's shaking so much! They'll get crushed...

subtitles.original: みんな みんな潰れるんじゃない？ ちょっとやめてよ！
subtitles.english: Everyone, won't everyone get crushed? Stop it!

subtitles.original: 神！ はい！ あぁぁ！
subtitles.english: God! Yes! Aaaaah!

subtitles.original: アイリスー！ 残りは二人！
subtitles.english: IRyS! Two left!

subtitles.original: ルーナ先輩 元に戻してくださいよ！
subtitles.english: Luna-senpai, please turn her back!

subtitles.original: じゃないと潰れちゃうぞ！
subtitles.english: Or we'll be crushed!

subtitles.original: もしかしたらお茶かければ元に戻るかも？
subtitles.english: Maybe if I pour tea on her she'll go back?

subtitles.original: 暴力 暴力反対！
subtitles.english: Violence! I'm against violence!

subtitles.original: それだ！ やってよルーナ！ 頼む！
subtitles.english: That's it! Do it Luna! Please!

subtitles.original: 足元にかけてみるのら 普通にかけるんですか
subtitles.english: I'll try pouring it on her feet. Just normally?

subtitles.original: ジョボジョボジョボ...
subtitles.english: Dojo dojo dojo...

subtitles.original: おぉ？！ え？！ ちっちゃい！
subtitles.english: Oh?! Eh?! Small!

subtitles.original: さっきよりもちっちゃくなっちゃった！
subtitles.english: She got even smaller than before!

subtitles.original: ルーナ先輩 どういう飲み物なんですかそれ！
subtitles.english: Luna-senpai, what kind of drink is that?!

subtitles.original: 小さくなったならね… そんなことはどうだっていいんだよ
subtitles.english: If you got smaller... That doesn't matter now!

subtitles.original: あにゃ あにゃ ちっちゃい！
subtitles.english: Anya, Anya, so tiny!

subtitles.original: 可愛いね！ 妖精みたいだよ！
subtitles.english: Cute! Like a fairy!

subtitles.original: 小さーい！ 出た出た出た ひどいことしないでよ！
subtitles.english: So small! There it is. Don't do anything mean!

subtitles.original: 可愛いから ご褒美あげちゃう
subtitles.english: Since you're cute, I'll give you a reward.

subtitles.original: え どういうご褒美？ あにゃちゃん
subtitles.english: Eh, what kind of reward? Anya-chan...

subtitles.original: おらぁぁ！ それは… それは…
subtitles.english: Oryah! That... that...

subtitles.original: アイリスの足が… ぱんつらと見せかけて…
subtitles.english: IRyS's legs... looks like a pantsu-shot...

subtitles.original: ババババン！ 何て 残酷な…
subtitles.english: Boom boom boom! How cruel...

subtitles.original: 痛い 痛い！ ちょっと2メートルがやることじゃないよ！
subtitles.english: Ouch, ouch! That's not something a 2-meter-tall person should do!

subtitles.original: あにゃが2メートルだと思いますー？
subtitles.english: Do you think Anya is 2 meters tall?

subtitles.original: 2センチだよ こんなにちっちゃくて可愛いから
subtitles.english: You're 2 centimeters because you're so tiny and cute.

subtitles.original: 確かに 2センチだね
subtitles.english: True, 2 centimeters.

subtitles.original: あにゃにプレゼントもあげたことだし そろそろ帰ろっか
subtitles.english: Since we gave Anya a present, it's about time to head back.

subtitles.original: 時間だし じゃあね！
subtitles.english: It's time, bye!

subtitles.original: 元に戻してくださいよその前に！ 元に戻してくださいよー！
subtitles.english: Turn me back before that! Turn me back!

subtitles.original: ちょっと待ってー！
subtitles.english: Wait!

subtitles.original: 響かせていく
subtitles.english: Let it resonate

subtitles.original: The party's over
subtitles.english: The party's over

subtitles.original: お芝居はお終い
subtitles.english: The play is finished

subtitles.original: 止まらない We get it, we get it go
subtitles.english: I can't stop, We get it, we get it go

subtitles.original: 導いて頂戴...
subtitles.english: Lead me on...

subtitles.original: Don't cry
subtitles.english: Don't cry

subtitles.original: あたらしい今も 気後れないように創るから
subtitles.english: I'll create the new now so I won't feel left behind

subtitles.original: 必ず追い付いて見せるから
subtitles.english: I'll show you I can definitely catch up

subtitles.original: 兎角今迄
subtitles.english: Anyway, until now

subtitles.original: 正しいことは与えられてた
subtitles.english: The right things were given to us

subtitles.original: 送り足を送れたのは
subtitles.english: The one who sent me off...

subtitles.original: 君だけ
subtitles.english: Was only you

subtitles.original: 愛していたい
subtitles.english: I want to keep loving you

subtitles.original: 歌い出さなきゃ始まらない
subtitles.english: It won't start unless we start singing

subtitles.original: いびつなステップでもいい 今は君と踊っていたい
subtitles.english: Even if it's an awkward step, right now I want to dance with you

subtitles.original: ただ 生きるためのまじないを そこに残したんだ
subtitles.english: I left a spell there just for the sake of living

subtitles.original: 命を追ってほしい 君と短く長い季節を辿っていたい
subtitles.english: I want you to chase life, I want to trace the short and long seasons with you

subtitles.original: Night-night party's over 初めまして
subtitles.english: Night-night, the party's over, nice to meet you
